message:
fix(codegen): Use inferred type for PyValue negation

Simplify PyValue negation check to use the already-inferred operand_type
instead of manually looking up in variable maps. This fixes negation of
module constants like FLT_MAX from sys.float_info which weren't in
var_types or scoped vars.

- Use operand_type == .pyvalue instead of variable map lookup
- Handles: local vars, scoped vars, module constants, expressions
- Fixes test_float -(FLT_MAX) negation compilation error
